sanctioned_deterministic_writers.rationale: Session boundaries are mechanical lifecycle records.
Flush checkpoints record process progress, not semantic interpretation.

sanctioned_deterministic_writers.provenance_requirement: source id, source event id, and hydration ref
sanctioned_deterministic_writers.rationale: External anchors preserve caller-owned source evidence.

sanctioned_deterministic_writers.provenance_requirement: session id, turn id, and status history
sanctioned_deterministic_writers.rationale: Pending/repair state is an operational receipt, never a canonical bead.
Projects explicit persisted links and agent associations into structural edges.
Repairs graph projections from already persisted structural fields.

sanctioned_deterministic_writers.provenance_requirement: heuristic version and visible bead id
sanctioned_deterministic_writers.rationale: Heuristic promotion signals are append-only advice only.

sanctioned_deterministic_writers.provenance_requirement: score, threshold, and candidate bead id
sanctioned_deterministic_writers.rationale: Candidate scoring is advisory rather than canonical promotion authority.

sanctioned_deterministic_writers.provenance_requirement: score, threshold, and candidate bead id
sanctioned_deterministic_writers.rationale: Rebalance results are demotion recommendations only.
Heuristic or legacy claim extraction is review context only.

sanctioned_deterministic_writers.provenance_requirement: trigger bead id and authored review provenance
sanctioned_deterministic_writers.rationale: Automatic reconciliation is advice; explicit authored updates remain canonical.

sanctioned_deterministic_writers.provenance_requirement: candidate id, explicit_agent_action, and scoped-resolution receipt
sanctioned_deterministic_writers.rationale: An explicit agent decision can apply a reviewed conflict resolution.
Legacy causal backfill now emits candidates and deprecation telemetry only.

sanctioned_deterministic_writers.provenance_requirement: pair bead ids, signal kinds, and candidate generation version
sanctioned_deterministic_writers.rationale: Deterministic shortlisting emits evidence signals but never relationship truth.
